name: Starfall
desc: Bright stars streaking down the sky with glowing trails
author: Gunner47
coverSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200"><defs><linearGradient id="sky" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0B1024"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#1E3A5F"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0F172A"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="trail1" x1="30%" y1="10%" x2="70%" y2="90%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#FFFFFF" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#FBBF24" stop-opacity=".7"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFFFFF" stop-opacity="1"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="trail2" x1="60%" y1="5%" x2="40%" y2="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#67E8F9" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#FFFFFF" stop-opacity="1"/></linearGradient><filter id="glow"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2"/></filter></defs><rect width="200" height="200" fill="url(#sky)"/><circle cx="30" cy="40" r="1" fill="#fff" opacity=".5"/><circle cx="60" cy="25" r=".8" fill="#fff" opacity=".4"/><circle cx="110" cy="50" r="1" fill="#fff" opacity=".5"/><circle cx="160" cy="30" r=".9" fill="#fff" opacity=".4"/><circle cx="175" cy="75" r=".7" fill="#fff" opacity=".3"/><circle cx="45" cy="95" r=".8" fill="#fff" opacity=".4"/><path d="M70,20 L110,150" stroke="url(#trail1)" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#glow)"/><circle cx="110" cy="150" r="4" fill="#fff" filter="url(#glow)"/><circle cx="110" cy="150" r="2" fill="#FFFBEB"/><path d="M150,10 L130,80" stroke="url(#trail2)" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" filter="url(#glow)" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="130" cy="80" r="3" fill="#fff" filter="url(#glow)" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="130" cy="80" r="1.5" fill="#E0F2FE"/></svg>
